author: Eunjae Lee
subject: v5.7.0
body:
# [5.7.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.6.0...v5.7.0) (2019-06-04)

### Bug Fixes

* **highlight:** allow array as "attribute" ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2474](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2474)) ([76ff5ee](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/76ff5ee)), closes [#2461](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2461)
* **indexUtils:** allow index with dots in it ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2350](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2350)) ([b530eb2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/b530eb2))

### Features

* **voiceSearch:** add voice search widget ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2316](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2316)) ([0e6d14a](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/0e6d14a))
